## Summary

Describe the focused change and the user problem it solves.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `make check test`.
- [ ] I updated English and Simplified Chinese documentation together when user-facing text changed.
- [ ] I used only fictional or sanitized data in tests, screenshots, logs, and examples.

## Local-first safety

- [ ] This change adds no analytics, telemetry, account system, external runtime content, or automatic destructive synchronization.
- [ ] File-changing actions remain explicit and preserve the existing backup-before-delete behavior.
- [ ] I did not include credentials, usernames, personal paths, or real conversation content.

## Notes for reviewers

Call out any behavior, packaging, privacy, or compatibility tradeoffs.
